description_long: This office building features a simple, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a uniform facade. The exterior is finished in a muted peach color, accented by white window frames and trim, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The building has three visible stories, each with a regular grid of large, square windows that allow ample natural light inside. The front facade is distinguished by a recessed ground floor with three tall, rectangular entryways, suggesting a main entrance area. The windows are symmetrically arranged, contributing to the building's orderly and professional look. There is no visible signage or decorative detailing, emphasizing a functional and contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, peach-colored office building with three stories, white trim, and a grid of large windows. The front features a recessed entryway with tall rectangular openings.
description_view_0: This view shows a flat facade with three rows of three evenly spaced windows, all framed in white, with no visible entrance.
description_view_1: This view reveals the front of the building, featuring three tall, rectangular entryways on the ground floor beneath three rows of windows.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors view 0, displaying three rows of three windows with no visible entrance or additional features.
description_view_3: This view is nearly identical to views 0 and 2, showing a flat facade with three rows of three windows and no entrance.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular grid of three rows and three columns of square windows per facade, symmetrically spaced.
